headline: OpenAI faces IPO scrutiny amid privacy, data security concerns
body: OpenAI's planned public offering is drawing regulatory and competitive pressure as multiple jurisdictions scrutinize the company's data handling practices. Florida has filed suit claiming OpenAI concealed serious risks, while new privacy policies disclosing ad targeting and reported incidents of users receiving others' responses via image uploads have intensified scrutiny. For healthcare AI vendors and health systems evaluating generative AI partnerships, these governance gaps highlight critical vetting requirements around data isolation, patient privacy compliance, and liability frameworks that must precede any clinical deployment decisions.
